title: Combination A: Pick the Structure
bodyText: Unknown A has formula $C_4H_{10}O$, a $^1H$ NMR signal near $3.6\ ppm$ for $CH_2-O$, and a terminal methyl triplet near $0.9\ ppm$. Which structure best fits?

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show IR, 1H NMR, and MS evidence side by side for a small alcohol unknown.
Mock 3D molecule figure: normally this would be a rotatable candidate structure or the solved unknown shown in ball-and-stick form.

feedbacks: Correct: 1-butanol fits C4H10O, a CH2-O signal, and a terminal methyl triplet.
2-butanone would contain a carbonyl and has formula C4H8O.
Diethyl ether has CH2-O signals but would show a more symmetric ethyl pattern.
Butanal would show an aldehyde proton near 9-10 ppm and has formula C4H8O.
